summary: WMS Inventory Import & New Features Testing - Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified via Playwright. Data shows 19,320 records imported with 2,075,668 on_hand units and 2,891 locations.
features_tested: Backend GET /api/wms/inventory/summary - returns accurate totals: 19320 total_skus, 2075668 on_hand, 2891 locations - PASS
Backend GET /api/wms/inventory/filters - returns unique customers(12), categories(11), manufacturers(35), styles(175) - PASS
Backend GET /api/wms/inventory - returns records with new fields (customer, style, description, category, manufacturer, inv_location, total_boxes) - PASS
Backend GET /api/wms/inventory?customer=Anchored Prints - filter by customer works (300 records matched) - PASS
Backend GET /api/wms/inventory?style=1001 - filter by style works (169 records matched) - PASS
Backend GET /api/wms/inventory?category=GIRLS - filter by category works (9 records matched) - PASS
Backend GET /api/wms/orders - only returns BLANKS board or PARTIAL/PARCIAL status orders (12 orders) - PASS
Backend orders response has blank_status field - PASS
Backend GET /api/wms/export/inventory - returns XLSX file with new columns (941KB file) - PASS
Backend POST /api/wms/import/inventory - requires file upload (422 without file) - PASS
Backend POST /api/wms/import/inventory - validates Excel file type (400 for non-Excel) - PASS
Backend all WMS endpoints require authentication - PASS
Frontend Inventory module shows summary cards: 19,320 registros, 2,075,668 on hand, 2,891 ubicaciones - PASS
Frontend Inventory module has 'Importar Excel' button (data-testid=import-inv-btn) - PASS
Frontend Inventory module has 'Exportar' button (data-testid=export-inv-btn) - PASS
Frontend Inventory module has Filtros button that opens filter panel - PASS
Frontend Inventory filter panel has Customer dropdown (data-testid=inv-filter-customer) - PASS
Frontend Inventory filter panel has Category dropdown (data-testid=inv-filter-category) - PASS
Frontend Inventory table columns: CUSTOMER, STYLE, COLOR, SIZE, DESCRIPTION, CATEGORY, LOCATION, BOXES, ON HAND, ALLOCATED, AVAILABLE - PASS
Frontend Orders module shows description 'Ordenes del tablero BLANKS y ordenes con status PARTIAL/PARCIAL' - PASS
Frontend Orders table has BLANK STATUS column - PASS
Frontend Orders table shows orders from BLANKS board - PASS
Frontend Orders table shows order with PARTIAL status from non-BLANKS board - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: Excel import correctly clears existing inventory and bulk inserts new records in batches of 1000
Location auto-creation from InvLocation column working (2891 locations created from 2890 unique values + existing)
MongoDB aggregation pipeline for summary is efficient
Orders filter query uses $or with case-insensitive regex for both board='blanks' and blank_status containing 'partial/parcial'

All inventory fields from Excel properly mapped: CustomerID->customer, Style->style/sku, Description, Category, Manufacturer, InvLocation->inv_location, Total Boxes->total_boxes, TotalUnits->on_hand/available
seed_data_creation: 19,320 inventory records already imported from Excel file before this test iteration. 2,891 locations auto-created. 12 orders match BLANKS/PARTIAL criteria.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WMS Inventory Import feature fully tested. Data in DB: 19,320 inventory records with new fields (customer, style, description, category, manufacturer, inv_location, total_boxes), 2,891 locations, 12 orders matching BLANKS/PARTIAL filter. Frontend displays all expected summary metrics and table columns. Import endpoint clears existing inventory before bulk insert. Export generates XLSX with 14 columns. No mocked APIs.
